Volunteer opportunities available. 8313 SW Cirrus Drive Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Age 8 and older and identified as having an intellectual or cognitive disability by a medical professional Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 248-0600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL OLYMPICS OREGON SPECIAL OLYMPICS OREGON
